title: echinochloa crus-galli subsp. colonum
intro: Echinochloa crus-galli subsp. colonum, commonly known as barnyard grass or large barnyard grass, is a type of invasive grass that is widely distributed across various parts of the world. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Echinochloa crus-galli subsp. colonum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe sore throats, reduce swelling, and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying the leaves and stems, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions.
